text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
This is so stupid! If it's not gonna go the way I
want, then I don't wanna do it anymore!
choice_data_list:
Does that mean you're giving up on becoming a
witch?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: ...No! No way! I'm gonna be a witch! There's no way I'm quitting!
choice_data_list: Then, we'll just have to win some races.
Then, we'll just have to win some races.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
...Th-that's right! It's all pointless if I don't win! It'll
be boring and, even worse, I won't become a
witch!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: That's why I'm winning the next one for sure!
choice_data_list: In that case, let's train hard!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: That's why I'm winning the next one for sure!
choice_data_list: In that case, let's train hard!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Of course I'm confident! 'Cause I'm gonna make
an amazing spell to make sure I win!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Now, don't just stand there! Hurry up and help me
out!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Nngh... What do we need to train for? Can't we
use magic to just get it over with?!
choice_data_list: It's training to master victory magic.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Hm... You make it sound like you have some
secret training planned or something.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Fine. I guess I can give it a try. But if I still lose,
you're in big trouble!
